themes.reasoning_notes: Heroic explicitly rewards being targeted, and each trigger adds a +1/+1 counter plus shrinks an opposing creature.
Uses +1/+1 counters as its core resource; gaining a counter repeatedly converts into creature weakening.
Counter placement removes a +1/+1 counter from an opposing creature, acting as repeatable shrink-based removal support.
Heroic explicitly rewards being targeted, and each trigger adds a +1/+1 counter plus shrinks an opposing creature.
Uses +1/+1 counters as its core resource; gaining a counter repeatedly converts into creature weakening.
Counter placement removes a +1/+1 counter from an opposing creature, acting as repeatable shrink-based removal support.
